---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Capsule
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A brief, one-line summary of the feature.

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem this feature would solve. What pain point or limitation are you experiencing?

> Ex: "As a DevOps engineer, I need to ... so that I can ..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Component

Which component(s) would this affect?

- [ ] Backend (API Server)
- [ ] Frontend (Web Dashboard)
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Infrastructure / Deployment
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] New Component

## User Experience

How would users interact with this feature?

### CLI Example (if applicable)

```bash
capsule <new-command> --flag value
```

### API Example (if applicable)

```http
POST /api/v1/<resource>
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "key": "value"
}
```

### UI Mockup (if applicable)

Attach mockups, wireframes, or screenshots of similar features in other tools.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Priority

How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] 🔴 Critical — blocking my workflow
- [ ] 🟡 Important — significant improvement
- [ ] 🟢 Nice to have — quality of life improvement
